turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.text: I have been thinking about studying psychology because I want to work in mental health.

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: That fits you. You also said you enjoy helping friends work through stressful situations.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.text: I am also looking into counseling certification programs in case I want a more applied path.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.text: For stress relief I usually go dancing or read for an hour before bed.
